title: Cunctation In Correction.
content:
The lictors bundled up their rods; beside,
    Knit them with knots with much ado unti'd,
    That if, unknitting, men would yet repent,
    They might escape the lash of punishment.
meaning:
"Cunctation In Correction." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
